major.heading: Calibration absent
major.comment: No calibration plot or Brier score is reported.

major.heading: Discrimination overstated
major.comment: AUC discrimination is reported without a confidence interval.

major.heading: Heterogeneity ignored
major.comment: I2 heterogeneity is high but not explored.

major.heading: Confidence intervals missing
major.comment: Pooled estimates lack a confidence interval.

major.heading: Multiplicity uncorrected
major.comment: Multiplicity across many outcomes is not corrected.

major.heading: Missing data handling
major.comment: Missing data and imputation are not described.
